heading: SOVEREIGNTY, INTEGRITY, DEMOCRACY, AND ECONOMIC STABILITY OF UKRAINE
label: 96 SOVEREIGNTY, INTEGRITY, DEMOCRACY, AND ECONOMIC STABILITY OF UKRAINE

children.heading: Provision of costs of loan guarantees for Ukraine
Recovery of assets linked to governmental corruption in Ukraine
Democracy, civil society, governance, and technical assistance for Ukraine and other states in Central and Eastern Europe
Enhanced security cooperation with Ukraine and other countries in Central and Eastern Europe
Sanctions on persons responsible for violence or undermining the peace, security, stability, sovereignty, or territorial integrity of Ukraine
Sanctions on persons in the Russian Federation complicit in or responsible for significant corruption
Mandatory imposition of sanctions with respect to certain transactions with persons that evade sanctions imposed with respect to the Russian Federation
Mandatory imposition of sanctions with respect to transactions with persons responsible for human rights abuses
